title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
